# OneClick Wellness / 壹鍵康

> All-in-one AI health management platform by OneClick HealthTech Limited (壹健康科技有限公司).

## Site

- Home: /
- Privacy: /privacy
- Terms: /terms
- Disclaimer: /disclaimer
- Admin: /admin (private)

## Product

- Web / iOS / Android app: https://app.oneclick.hk
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=hk.com.oneclick.wellness

## About

OneClick Wellness combines AI health questionnaires and reports, health-check booking, enterprise group plans, and wellness products for users in Hong Kong and the Greater Bay Area.

Information on the marketing site is for health-management reference only and does not replace medical advice.
